<section id="counter-root" class="live-ui-layout live-ui-layout--vbox" style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px" data-live-ui-kind="vbox" data-live-ui-widget-id="counter-root"> <p id="counter-label" class="live-ui-text counter-value" style="" data-live-ui-widget-id="counter-label"> Count: 4 </p> <button id="increment-button" type="button" class="live-ui-button" style="" phx-click="click" phx-value-widget_id="increment-button" phx-value-widget_kind="button" phx-value-event_click_intent="activate" phx-value-event_click_delta="1"> Increment </button> </section>
